svg.title: SVG Image created as PCB_glove-NOTES AND TODOS.svg date 2026/07/20 23:02:59

g.style: fill:#000000; fill-opacity:1.0000;stroke:#000000; stroke-opacity:1.0000; stroke-linecap:round; stroke-linejoin:round;

g.text: DESIGN NOTES, BLOCKERS, AND REVIEW GATES

g.desc: DESIGN NOTES, BLOCKERS, AND REVIEW GATES

g.text: 1. DRAFT ONLY / NOT FOR FABRICATION / RUN FULL REVIEW BEFORE PCB LAYOUT.

g.desc: 1. DRAFT ONLY / NOT FOR FABRICATION / RUN FULL REVIEW BEFORE PCB LAYOUT.

g.text: 2. DK PIN MAPPING TBD: obtain and review local UM3300 + MB1939 schematic; map Arduino/STMod+ overlaps and solder bridges.

g.desc: 2. DK PIN MAPPING TBD: obtain and review local UM3300 + MB1939 schematic; map Arduino/STMod+ overlaps and solder bridges.

g.text: 3. CONNECTORS TBD: select finger, DK adapter, and power connector families only from exact MPN drawings and glove-mechanical requirements.

g.desc: 3. CONNECTORS TBD: select finger, DK adapter, and power connector families only from exact MPN drawings and glove-mechanical requirements.

g.text: 4. IMU: confirm current ISM330DHCX datasheet, lifecycle, SPI timing, reset behavior, supply limits, symbol pins, pad map, and land pattern.

g.desc: 4. IMU: confirm current ISM330DHCX datasheet, lifecycle, SPI timing, reset behavior, supply limits, symbol pins, pad map, and land pattern.

g.text: 5. HARNESS: define maximum branch lengths, ground references, strain relief, bend cycles, shielding/EMI needs, and oscilloscope test plan.

g.desc: 5. HARNESS: define maximum branch lengths, ground references, strain relief, bend cycles, shielding/EMI needs, and oscilloscope test plan.

g.text: 6. POWER: calculate DK headroom and five-IMU worst-case/transient load; decide dedicated +3V3_IMU regulator and protection.

g.desc: 6. POWER: calculate DK headroom and five-IMU worst-case/transient load; decide dedicated +3V3_IMU regulator and protection.

g.text: 7. CAMERAS BLOCKED: no wiring or footprints until exact DK/CAM documents and one/two-camera feasibility are proven.

g.desc: 7. CAMERAS BLOCKED: no wiring or footprints until exact DK/CAM documents and one/two-camera feasibility are proven.

g.text: 8. FOOTPRINTS: all DRAFT_ local footprints are preparation aids only; do not place on PCB before mechanical and manufacturing review.

g.desc: 8. FOOTPRINTS: all DRAFT_ local footprints are preparation aids only; do not place on PCB before mechanical and manufacturing review.

g.text: 9. ERC: retain and explain every warning; do not suppress warnings to imply readiness.

g.desc: 9. ERC: retain and explain every warning; do not suppress warnings to imply readiness.

g.text: 10. FINAL GATE: independent schematic, power, connector, footprint, pin-map, signal-integrity, and wearable-safety review before layout.

g.desc: 10. FINAL GATE: independent schematic, power, connector, footprint, pin-map, signal-integrity, and wearable-safety review before layout.
